# Regression-catcher fixtures

Static "known-bad" screenshots used by `scripts/daily-audit.sh` and
`scripts/regression-smoke.sh` to verify that the ux-designer vision
pipeline still flags previously-fixed defects (QD#1 / QD#2 trust anchor —
see `/skills/AGENTS-ux-designer.md` § BLD-480 Trust Anchor).

Re-capture only via `.github/workflows/regression-fixture-capture.yml`
(workflow_dispatch). Do NOT hand-edit these PNGs.

## bld-480-pre-fix.png

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Source SHA | `cce2ac1f828538bf884f91c5e209ab9f6a40d87f` (parent of `6f067cc` — BLD-480 fix PR #292) |
| Scenario | `completed-workout` |
| Viewport | mobile (Playwright `mobile` project) |
| Captured at | _filled by capture workflow_ |
| Capture workflow run | _filled by capture workflow_ |
| Captured by | `.github/workflows/regression-fixture-capture.yml` |

The image reproduces the MusclesWorkedCard `maxHeight` cropping bug fixed
in PR #292. The daily audit feeds it (alongside the standard audit prompt)
into the vision pipeline; if the pipeline stops emitting findings matching

```
crop|truncat|clip|maxHeight|cut off|MusclesWorkedCard|body-figure
```

the audit fails and the regression-catcher alarm fires.

> **Note:** The PNG itself is committed by the auto-PR generated by the
> `regression-fixture-capture.yml` workflow. Until that workflow has run
> at least once, this directory contains only this README, and
> `scripts/daily-audit.sh` will exit non-zero with a pointer to the
> workflow.

Refs: BLD-959, BLD-941, BLD-924, BLD-480.
